Season.description: The MLB season for which these totals apply

RegularSeasonStartDate.description: The start date of the regular season

PostSeasonStartDate.description: The start date of the postseason

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar).

ApiSeason.description: The string to pass into subsequent API calls in the season parameter (e.g. 2025REG, 2025POST, etc.).
